DEFT IS DOLE OCCUPANT PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. DEFT WVS RIGHT TO APPLY FOR STAY OF EXECUTION. IF DEFT RETURNS KEYS BY NOON 3/11/97 PLTF WILL EXECUTE A STIP TO VACATE JUDGMENT& REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL W/PREJ. DEFT TO PREPARE PAPERS. SEE JUDGMENT.
